templates.subject: Welcome to FCEI - Your Module Is Ready
templates.preheader: Access your FCEI module, resources and evidence tasks.
templates.body_md:
Hello {{learner_first_name}},

Welcome to the **Finland Creative Education Institute (FCEI)**.

You are now enrolled in **{{course_title}}**.

Module: **{{module_title}}**

This FCEI professional learning module is designed to help educators, leaders, trainers and education teams translate Finnish education principles into practical, evidence-informed action.

You can access your module videos, lesson pages, downloadable templates, reflection activities and evidence-upload tasks from your FCEI profile.

Your progress will be saved automatically, so you can return at your own pace.

Warm regards,
**The FCEI Team**
**Finland Creative Education Institute**

FCEI Finnish Teacher Training Development Framework

Manage your email preferences: {{email_preferences_url}}

templates.subject: Your FCEI Account Has Been Created
templates.preheader: Your FCEI learning profile is ready.
templates.body_md:
Hello {{learner_first_name}},

Your FCEI account has been created successfully.

You can use your profile to access active enrolments, module progress, downloadable resources, evidence tasks, certificates, badges and support links.

Keep your login details secure and use FCEI Support if you need help accessing your account.

Warm regards,
**The FCEI Team**
**Finland Creative Education Institute**

FCEI Finnish Teacher Training Development Framework

Manage your email preferences: {{email_preferences_url}}

templates.subject: You Have Started {{course_title}}
templates.preheader: Continue your FCEI learning pathway.
templates.body_md:
Hello {{learner_first_name}},

You have started **{{course_title}}**.

This course is part of the FCEI Finnish Teacher Training Development Framework. It connects Finnish education principles with practical evidence, reflection and improvement.

Your next step is to complete the first module activity and review the evidence requirement.

Warm regards,
**The FCEI Team**
**Finland Creative Education Institute**

FCEI Finnish Teacher Training Development Framework

Manage your email preferences: {{email_preferences_url}}

templates.subject: Your Next FCEI Module Is Unlocked
templates.preheader: Continue your learning journey.
templates.body_md:
Hello {{learner_first_name}},

Your next module is now available: **{{module_title}}**.

In this module, you will continue building practical professional evidence through guided learning, downloadable resources, action tasks and reflection.

Warm regards,
**The FCEI Team**
**Finland Creative Education Institute**

FCEI Finnish Teacher Training Development Framework

Manage your email preferences: {{email_preferences_url}}

templates.subject: Continue Your FCEI Module
templates.preheader: Your progress is saved and ready when you return.
templates.body_md:
Hello {{learner_first_name}},

This is a reminder that your FCEI module is still in progress: **{{module_title}}**.

Your progress has been saved automatically. You can return to the module and continue from where you stopped.

Warm regards,
**The FCEI Team**
**Finland Creative Education Institute**

FCEI Finnish Teacher Training Development Framework

Manage your email preferences: {{email_preferences_url}}

templates.subject: Your FCEI Evidence Task Has Been Submitted
templates.preheader: Your evidence has been received.
templates.body_md:
Hello {{learner_first_name}},

Your evidence task for **{{module_title}}** has been submitted.

Your submission has been received and stored in your FCEI learning profile. If your module requires review, you will receive an update when the review status changes.

Warm regards,
**The FCEI Team**
**Finland Creative Education Institute**

FCEI Finnish Teacher Training Development Framework

Manage your email preferences: {{email_preferences_url}}

templates.subject: Your FCEI Evidence Has Been Approved
templates.preheader: Your module evidence has met the requirement.
templates.body_md:
Hello {{learner_first_name}},

Your evidence submission for **{{module_title}}** has been approved.

This means your submitted artefact meets the module evidence requirement and has been recorded in your FCEI profile.

Warm regards,
**The FCEI Team**
**Finland Creative Education Institute**

FCEI Finnish Teacher Training Development Framework

Manage your email preferences: {{email_preferences_url}}

templates.subject: Revision Needed for Your FCEI Evidence Task
templates.preheader: Please update your evidence submission.
templates.body_md:
Hello {{learner_first_name}},

Your evidence submission for **{{module_title}}** needs revision before it can be approved.

Reviewer note:

{{reviewer_note}}

Please update your submission by following the evidence requirement and upload the revised version through your module page.

Warm regards,
**The FCEI Team**
**Finland Creative Education Institute**

FCEI Finnish Teacher Training Development Framework

Manage your email preferences: {{email_preferences_url}}

templates.subject: Congratulations - You Have Completed {{course_title}}
templates.preheader: Your FCEI course completion has been recorded.
templates.body_md:
Hello {{learner_first_name}},

Congratulations. You have completed **{{course_title}}**.

Your completion has been recorded in your FCEI profile. You have completed the learning activities, evidence tasks and reflection requirements linked to this course within the FCEI Finnish Teacher Training Development Framework.

Warm regards,
**The FCEI Team**
**Finland Creative Education Institute**

FCEI Finnish Teacher Training Development Framework

Manage your email preferences: {{email_preferences_url}}

templates.subject: Your FCEI Certificate Is Ready
templates.preheader: Download your certificate from your FCEI profile.
templates.body_md:
Hello {{learner_first_name}},

Your FCEI certificate for **{{course_title}}** is now available.

Your certificate may include the course title, module record, completion date, learning hours, verification code and evidence-based learning outcome.

Warm regards,
**The FCEI Team**
**Finland Creative Education Institute**

FCEI Finnish Teacher Training Development Framework

Manage your email preferences: {{email_preferences_url}}

templates.subject: Your FCEI Professional Toolkit Is Ready
templates.preheader: Access your paid FCEI add-on toolkit.
templates.body_md:
Hello {{learner_first_name}},

Thank you for your purchase.

Your FCEI professional toolkit is now available: **{{addon_title}}**.

This toolkit is connected to **{{module_title}}** and includes advanced downloadable templates, implementation tools, scenario resources, evidence rubrics and reflection materials.

Warm regards,
**The FCEI Team**
**Finland Creative Education Institute**

FCEI Finnish Teacher Training Development Framework

Manage your email preferences: {{email_preferences_url}}

templates.subject: Your FCEI Payment Receipt
templates.preheader: Receipt for your FCEI purchase.

templates.subject: FCEI Payment Could Not Be Completed
templates.preheader: Please update your payment details.
templates.body_md:
Hello {{learner_first_name}},

We were unable to complete the payment for **{{product_title}}**.

Please review your payment method or try again using the secure checkout link below. Your course or toolkit access may remain pending until payment is completed.

Warm regards,
**The FCEI Team**
**Finland Creative Education Institute**

FCEI Finnish Teacher Training Development Framework

Manage your email preferences: {{email_preferences_url}}

templates.subject: We Have Received Your FCEI Consultancy Enquiry
templates.preheader: Thank you for contacting FCEI Consultancy.
templates.body_md:
Hello {{contact_first_name}},

Thank you for contacting the Finland Creative Education Institute.

We have received your consultancy enquiry for **{{institution_name}}**.

Your enquiry area: **{{consultancy_area}}**.

FCEI consultancy supports schools, colleges, education teams, leaders, teachers, trainers and stakeholders with practical, evidence-informed institutional improvement.

Warm regards,
**The FCEI Team**
**Finland Creative Education Institute**

FCEI Finnish Teacher Training Development Framework

Manage your email preferences: {{email_preferences_url}}

templates.subject: Your FCEI Discovery Call Is Confirmed
templates.preheader: Your consultancy discussion has been scheduled.

templates.subject: Your FCEI Institution Licence Is Active
templates.preheader: Your institution can now access FCEI learning.
templates.body_md:
Hello {{admin_first_name}},

Your FCEI institution licence has been activated for **{{institution_name}}**.

Your licence includes access for **{{seat_count}} learners**.

Institution administrators can invite learners, monitor progress, access reports and manage course enrolments from the institution dashboard.

Warm regards,
**The FCEI Team**
**Finland Creative Education Institute**

FCEI Finnish Teacher Training Development Framework

Manage your email preferences: {{email_preferences_url}}

templates.subject: You Have Been Invited to Join FCEI
templates.preheader: Your institution has invited you to access FCEI learning.
templates.body_md:
Hello {{learner_first_name}},

You have been invited by **{{institution_name}}** to access FCEI professional learning.

Your assigned course is **{{course_title}}**.

Please use the link below to activate your account and begin learning.

Warm regards,
**The FCEI Team**
**Finland Creative Education Institute**

FCEI Finnish Teacher Training Development Framework

Manage your email preferences: {{email_preferences_url}}

templates.subject: Tell Us About Your FCEI Learning Experience
templates.preheader: Your feedback helps us improve FCEI learning.
templates.body_md:
Hello {{learner_first_name}},

Thank you for completing **{{course_title}}**.

We would appreciate your feedback on your FCEI learning experience. Your review helps us improve the learning platform, module content, downloadable resources and evidence tasks for educators and institutions worldwide.

Warm regards,
**The FCEI Team**
**Finland Creative Education Institute**

FCEI Finnish Teacher Training Development Framework

Manage your email preferences: {{email_preferences_url}}

templates.subject: Reset Your FCEI Password
templates.preheader: Use this secure link to reset your password.
templates.body_md:
Hello {{learner_first_name}},

We received a request to reset the password for your FCEI account.

You can reset your password using the secure link below. If you did not request this, you can ignore this email.

Warm regards,
**The FCEI Team**
**Finland Creative Education Institute**

FCEI Finnish Teacher Training Development Framework

Manage your email preferences: {{email_preferences_url}}

templates.subject: We Have Received Your FCEI Support Request
templates.preheader: Your support request has been recorded.
templates.body_md:
Hello {{learner_first_name}},

Thank you for contacting FCEI Support.

We have received your support request.

**Ticket number:** {{ticket_number}}
**Subject:** {{ticket_subject}}

The FCEI Support Team will review your request and respond as soon as possible.

Warm regards,
**The FCEI Team**
**Finland Creative Education Institute**

FCEI Finnish Teacher Training Development Framework
